summary: The video captures a daytime scene on a rural road with moderate traffic. Vehicles are traveling in both directions, including trucks and cars. Trees line the roadside, and utility poles are visible in the distance.

events_timeline.event: Multiple vehicles are present on the road, including a white van on the left and two trucks—one large and one smaller—traveling in opposite directions.

uncertainties: Exact positions and velocities of all vehicles cannot be determined due to limited visibility.

risk_assessment.why: There are no apparent collisions, near misses, or hazardous behaviors observed among the vehicles.
